title: gymnogramma tenera
intro: Gymnogramma tenera, also known as soft fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gymnogramma tenera include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Gymnogramma tenera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
